response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 15+ years of software engineering experience and notable craftsmanship/testing focus, but the resume shows no formal people management or team leadership experience, which is the core requirement of this role. Also lacks the specific developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure background and mobile-platform ecosystem experience the role targets. Workshop teaching and founding an open-source project demonstrate leadership inclinations but do not substitute for the 2+ years of direct people management required.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong testing/TDD craftsmanship background including authoring test tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and teaching Selenium/TDD courses
Some adjacent dev-tooling work: CI/CD setup, GitLab/Docker/Artifactory infrastructure, and MCP code generators for agentic workflows
concerns: No explicit people management or team leadership experience listed — all roles are IC (Developer/Senior/Staff Engineer)
Limited dedicated developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure tenure at scale; experience is fragmented across product roles
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at the scale implied (brief iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-16 only)
